source: %% Bug-fix pipeline %% kitsoki viz --flowchart --detail states flowchart LR Start(["Start"]):::input subgraph SG___exit__abandoned["__exit__abandoned — Exit: abandoned"] direction LR ST___exit__abandoned[/"__exit__abandoned"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__done["__exit__done — Exit: done"] direction LR ST___exit__done[/"__exit__done"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__needs_human["__exit__needs-human — Exit: needs-human"] direction LR ST___exit__needs_human[/"__exit__needs-human"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__not_reproducible["__exit__not-reproducible — Exit: not-reproducible"] direction LR ST___exit__not_reproducible[/"__exit__not-reproducible"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__pick_ticket["__exit__pick_ticket — Exit: pick_ticket"] direction LR ST___exit__pick_ticket[/"__exit__pick_ticket"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__shipped["__exit__shipped — Exit: shipped"] direction LR ST___exit__shipped[/"__exit__shipped"/]:::room end subgraph SG___exit__triaged["__exit__triaged — Exit: triaged"] direction LR ST___exit__triaged[/"__exit__triaged"/]:::room end subgraph SG_done["phase 4 · done — Build the run's close-out artifact; accept to hand off to pr-refinement."] direction LR ST_done[/"done"/]:::room end subgraph SG_idle["phase 0 · idle — Bug-fix pipeline parked. Waiting for start."] direction LR ST_idle[/"idle"/]:::room end subgraph SG_implementing["phase 7 · implementing — Apply the proposed fix to the workspace; advance to testing."] direction LR ST_implementing[/"implementing"/]:::room end subgraph SG_proposing["phase 5 · proposing — Draft the fix proposal; review and advance to implementing."] direction LR ST_proposing[/"proposing"/]:::room end subgraph SG_reproducing["phase 1 · reproducing — Reproduce the bug; produce the reproduction artifact for review."] direction LR ST_reproducing[/"reproducing"/]:::room end subgraph SG_reviewing["phase 8 · reviewing — Self-review the diff (code + security); advance to validating."] direction LR ST_reviewing[/"reviewing"/]:::room ST_reviewing_external[/"reviewing_external"/]:::room end subgraph SG_tail["phase 9 · tail"] direction LR ST_tail_bootstrap[/"tail.bootstrap"/]:::room ST_tail_cleanup[/"tail.cleanup"/]:::room ST_tail_cr_bootstrap[/"tail.cr.bootstrap"/]:::room ST_tail_cr_conflict[/"tail.cr.conflict"/]:::room ST_tail_integrate[/"tail.integrate"/]:::room ST_tail_report[/"tail.report"/]:::room ST_tail_resolve[/"tail.resolve"/]:::room ST_tail_verify[/"tail.verify"/]:::room end subgraph SG_testing["phase 6 · testing — Run + review tests for the applied fix; advance to reviewing (or done in quick mode)."] direction LR ST_testing[/"testing"/]:::room end subgraph SG_triaging["phase 2 · triaging — Triage-only: assess whether the bug still exists; emit a standardized verdict. No fix."] direction LR ST_triaging[/"triaging"/]:::room end subgraph SG_validating["phase 3 · validating — Validate the fix against the full environment; advance to done."] direction LR ST_validating[/"validating"/]:::room end Start --> ST_idle ST_done -- "quit" --> ST___exit__abandoned ST_done -- "refine [world.done_cycle >= …]" --> ST___exit__abandoned ST_done -- "accept" -->
